text:
{
  "isSuspicious": false,
  "deviation": "",
  "indicators": [
    "WmiPrvSE.exe is a legitimate Windows process.",
    "Loading of system DLLs (e.g., crypt32.dll, setupapi.dll, IPHLPAPI.DLL, dnsapi.dll) is typical for WMI operations.",
    "Pipe connections to \\lsass and \\srvsvc, while sensitive, can be legitimate for WMI to query system and security information.",
    "Registry modifications under HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\Tcpip\\Parameters are consistent with WMI's role in network configuration and monitoring.",
    "DNS queries are also within the scope of WMI's information gathering capabilities."
  ]
}
